citation.description: Line 117: '- **ChatGPT / connector-limited sessions** — detecting a checkout-less, tracker-less environment, the safe fallback ticket payload, and the sanctioned exceptional import path → `docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md`.'

criteria.criterion: A ChatGPT-specific guidance file or clearly labeled section is discoverable from AGENTS.md without bloating the canonical startup context. Verify: grep -qi 'chatgpt' AGENTS.md.

citation.description: Lines 12-18 list all six dimensions: Local checkout, Native rebar/rebar-mcp binary, Tracker worktree (line 14), Network/remote access, GitHub connector, Gerrit availability (line 18).

criteria.criterion: Guidance includes an environment capability check covering local checkout, native rebar/rebar-mcp, tracker worktree, network/remote access, GitHub connector, and Gerrit availability. Verify: grep -qi 'tracker worktree' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md && grep -qi 'gerrit' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md.

citation.description: Line 31: 'The GitHub repository is a **read-only mirror** for code changes'; line 33: '**GitHub Issues are not a substitute for the Rebar tracker**'.

criteria.criterion: Guidance states that the GitHub repository is a read-only mirror for code changes and that GitHub Issues are not a substitute for the Rebar tracker. Verify: grep -qi 'read-only mirror' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md.

citation.description: Line 98 of the summary checklist: '- [ ] Used native search-before-create when the live tracker was reachable.' Also line 38-39 in the body: '**search before create**'.

criteria.criterion: Guidance requires search-before-create and native parent/child creation whenever the live tracker is accessible. Verify: grep -qi 'search-before-create' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md.

citation.description: Lines 41-44: 'Never hand-author, modify, or delete event files directly — the tracker is an **append-only** event log; every write must go through the locked native write path'.

criteria.criterion: Guidance prohibits hand-authoring, modifying, or deleting event files and explains the append-only reason. Verify: grep -qi 'append-only' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md.

citation.description: Lines 20-27 state the decision rule precisely; lines 50-65 document the fallback payload including export.schema.json (line 50), schema_version: 1 (line 52), agent-generated UUID4 ticket_id (lines 53-54), status: open (line 56), description with AC block (line 57), parent_id (line 58).

criteria.criterion: Guidance defines precisely when native ticket creation counts as 'impossible' (decision rule) and requires producing a reviewable ticket payload conforming to export.schema.json's required fields (schema_version: 1, agent-generated UUID4 ticket_id, ticket_type, title, status: open, description with AC block, parent_id if applicable). Verify: grep -qi 'export.schema.json' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md && grep -qi 'schema_version' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md.

citation.description: Lines 69-92 cover: rebar import / rebar.import_tickets() as only path (line 69-71), NDJSON (line 75), fresh local ids/HLC timestamps (line 76-77), dry-run no-counter/no-warning behavior (lines 82-86), would_create+skipped comparison (lines 87-89), confirm target branch (line 81), rebar validate/rebar fsck (line 91).

criteria.criterion: The documented exceptional import mechanism names rebar import (or rebar.import_tickets()) as the only sanctioned path, states NDJSON, fresh local ids/HLC timestamps, dry-run behavior (no counter increment, no warning for missing ticket_id/ticket_type), would_create+skipped comparison, target branch confirmation, and rebar validate/fsck afterward. Verify: grep -qi 'rebar import' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md && grep -qi 'rebar validate|rebar fsck' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md && grep -qi 'dry-run' docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md.

citation.description: File exists with 5 test functions: test_agents_md_links_to_the_guide (invariant 1), test_guide_does_not_recommend_github_issues_as_a_substitute (invariant 2), test_guide_does_not_sanction_direct_contents_api_writes (invariant 3), test_guide_names_rebar_import_as_the_only_sanctioned_ingest_mechanism (invariant 4), test_guide_fallback_fields_match_export_schema_required_array (invariant 5).

criteria.criterion: A lightweight documentation test (tests/unit/test_chatgpt_guide_links.py) asserts all 5 specified invariants against docs/chatgpt-agent-guide.md and AGENTS.md, and exits 0 only if ALL hold.
